full_text:
Wei Guan (Boyu) 衛瓘 (伯玉)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Guan (衛瓘), styledBoyu (伯玉). Sent to keep an eye on Zhong Hui and Deng Ai, he played a part in the death of both. Wei Guan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Wei Guan lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
